name: Grated Potato Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix potatoes, egg, diced onion, and flour together.
2. Oil a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Pour potato mixture into the greased pie plate and press evenly on the bottom and up the sides.
4. Bake at 400°F for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Next, mix eggs, light cream, nutmeg, salt, and pepper; set aside.
6. Place ham, onions, and broccoli into the baked potato crust.
7. Pour egg and milk mixture over the ham and vegetables.
8. Top with 1 1/2 cups of grated cheese (Swiss, American, or Cheddar).
9. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes or until set.
